content:
"sh", "bash", "zsh", "fish",
        "md", "txt", "rst", "adoc",
        "toml", "yaml", "yml", "json", "xml", "csv",
        "html", "css", "scss", "less", "sql",
        "dockerfile", "makefile", "justfile",
    ]
    .into_iter()
    .collect()
}
struct Metadata {
    name: &'static str,
    version: String,
    domain: &'static str,
    protocol_version: u32,
    description: &'static str,
    supported_extensions: Vec<String>,
    chunking_extensions: Vec<String>,
}
